ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the measurement was taken */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the measurement */,
  "day_of_year" INTEGER /* Day of the year of the measurement */,
  "lst_day" REAL /* Land Surface Temperature (LST) during the day */,
  "lst_night" REAL /* Land Surface Temperature (LST) during the night */,
  "qc_day" INTEGER /* Quality Control (QC) flag for the day measurement */,
  "qc_night" INTEGER /* Quality Control (QC) flag for the night measurement */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day (e.g., morning, evening) */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor used for the measurement */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, ground station) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., remote sensing, in-situ measurement) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context about the measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_qc_day FOREIGN KEY ("qc_day") REFERENCES quality_control ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_day_of_year FOREIGN KEY ("day_of_year") REFERENCES days_of_year ("day_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_qc_night FOREIGN KEY ("qc_night") REFERENCES quality_control ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of the site (e.g., urban, rural, coastal) */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Known environmental conditions at the site (e.g., forest, desert, wetland) */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last site survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the site (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year of the measurement */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the year is the current year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "days_of_year" (
  "day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day of the year */,
  "day_of_year" INTEGER /* Day of the year */,
  "day_name" TEXT /* Name of the day (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the year (e.g., spring, summer, fall, winter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each QC flag */,
  "qc_flag" INTEGER /* QC flag value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the QC flag */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the quality issue (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity verification */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the file is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., TXT, Markdown) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity verification */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the file is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical version */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the measurement */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "lst_day" REAL /* Land Surface Temperature (LST) during the day in the historical version */,
  "lst_night" REAL /* Land Surface Temperature (LST) during the night in the historical version */,
  "qc_day" INTEGER /* Quality Control (QC) flag for the day measurement in the historical version */,
  "qc_night" INTEGER /* Quality Control (QC) flag for the night measurement in the historical version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context about the historical version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or context about the measurement */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Overall data quality (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Spatial and temporal coverage of the data */,
  "is_validated" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data has been validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)
